name: Chicken Cordon Bleu#3
recipeIngredient: freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 1 slice of ham and 1 slice of cheese into each chicken breast.
2. Sprinkle parsley, garlic powder, salt, and pepper on the chicken.
3. Roll up each chicken breast and secure with toothpicks.
4. Brush with oil and roll in bread crumbs.
5. Bake in a shallow, greased pan at 350°F for 35 minutes.
